channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 qwibitai/nanoclaw (16654 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: qwibitai

📝 Repository: qwibitai/nanoclaw

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight alternative to Clawdbot / OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK

⭐ Stelle: 16654

🍴 Forks: 2627

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents ai-assistant claude-code claude-skills clawdbot

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-01-31T15:47:22Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-01T04:14:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 ForLoopCodes/contextplus (1202 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ForLoopCodes

📝 Repository: ForLoopCodes/contextplus

📄 Descrizione: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining Tree-sitter AST parsing, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph.

⭐ Stelle: 1202

🍴 Forks: 76

🏷️ Topics: mcp-server

item.title: 🟦 IgorShadurin/app.yumcut.com (1028 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IgorShadurin

📝 Repository: IgorShadurin/app.yumcut.com

📄 Descrizione: YumCut - free AI video generator to turn a prompt into ready vertical videos for TikTok, Reels and YouTube Shorts. Auto script, scenes, voiceover, subtitles and watermark. Built with Next.js. Local-first pipeline + templates, batch rendering and API hooks for creators and indie makers. Self-hosted, FFmpeg-ready, multi-language output. Low cost fast

⭐ Stelle: 1028

🍴 Forks: 36

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai ai-video-generator autoshorts bigmotion captions cartoon clippie comics creatify faceless free generator reels revid shorts subtitles tiktok video wava youtube

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-13T11:14:26Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-03T03:44:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 builderz-labs/mission-control (1014 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: builderz-labs

📝 Repository: builderz-labs/mission-control

📄 Descrizione: The open-source dashboard for AI agent orchestration. Manage agent fleets, track tasks, monitor costs, and orchestrate workflows — with direct CLI integration, GitHub sync, and real-time monitoring.

⭐ Stelle: 1014
